name: composer-swarm
description: Delegate repository work from Codex to local Composer worker teams.

interface.shortDescription: Run local Composer worker teams from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Composer Swarm lets Codex delegate repository work to isolated local Cursor/Composer workers, compare candidate patches, verify results, and apply only after explicit approval.
defaultPrompt: Use Composer Swarm to fix this bug.
